title: Exact Finite Markov Chain Checks

solver_reuse.target: finite Markov-chain bad stochastic-row QF_LRA/Farkas regression seed
solver_reuse.pressure: Malformed transition row where exact replay computes row sum 2/3 but row-stochasticity claims 1.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional stationary-distribution, finite-horizon, or absorbing-chain rows only when they add distinct exact-linear solver pressure; keep countably infinite chains, mixing times, and convergence theorems in the future theorem-prover backlog.

graduation_criteria: Encode stochastic-matrix and finite-horizon distribution checks as deterministic QF_LRA obligations.
Replay transition matrices, distributions, and stationary witnesses through exact rational matrix evaluation.
Keep the malformed stochastic-row rejection on Axeyum's checked Farkas evidence path.
Add finite hitting-time and absorbing-probability certificates before claiming broader stochastic-process coverage.
Keep countably infinite chains, convergence theorems, and mixing-time bounds under Lean/proof-horizon metadata.
